column1: Support Program - New Early Stage Startups - Onboarding Procedures

column3: Program Coordinator issues the onboarding form for B&A startups to fill. Which includes question on the sponsored accounts

The program Coordinator sends to the operations coordinator the names of the founders and startup names to get them sponsored accounts and then the Program coordinator send the startups their sponsored accounts
Program coordinator and PM get notified when the startups fill the form, their response is recorded on Zoho
The program coordinator sends the SMU form to the startups to fill and Program coordinator manager get notified when the startups fill the form –
SMU to confirm the registration of the B&A startups
Documents needed for SMU to register the startups in Lebanon:
Vetting Results to be sent to SMU if asked
Documents needed for SMU to register the startups outside Lebanon:
W9 Or Certificate of Incorporation OR Certificate of Registration OR
Any Official Document that Reveals the Legal Formation/Registration of the
Full Mailing Address( Address (City, Street, Building Name, Floor), Email, Phone Number, Contact Person,
Banking Details for wire transfer on an Official Letter signed and
Invoice that reveals the name under which it will be issued
VAT Registration Certificate; If Applicable or EIN
Vetting Results to be sent to SMU if asked
Program manager changes the documents status on Zoho
Below are the status names in bold requested by the Pogram department
1.Send email to SMU Department for the startups that are not registered or registered abroad, no need to send if registered in Lebanon (including startups documents)

2. Registered on SMU (IT means that the SMU department informed him that the startup is now registered on the system, here the SMU department defines how the startup is named to put this name on the SAFE agreement identically)
3. Bank Account Defined by AUB (PM asks SMU department if the Bank account for each startup is defined)
4. SAFE agreement sent to startup (PM drafts the SAFE agreement for each startup and then share with each startup to sign)
SAFE amount to be visible on the startup profile:
The program coordinator send the Sprints deliverables form to the startups to fill.
Startup founders fill the form, their responses are recorded on Zoho Program coordinator gets notified when the startups fill the form and completed
Program Manager sends the Needs Assessment form to the startups to fill.
Program manager issue a zoom meeting to meet with the startups and EIR,
and startup completes the assessment meeting.
Assessment Form is filled and recorded.
Communication and Outreach officer assigns lead or SME mentors to the startups, the assigned mentors should be visible on the  startup's profile.
Project manager connects the startups to their lead and SME mentors
Startups must attend all mandatory sessions (attendance tracked).
Startups submit deliverables by filling the form that we send at the beginning of the program and program manager and program coordinator to get notified when they submit deliverables
Deliverables must be submitted and Completion of deliverables qualifies the startup to move to the next sprint.
(there should be a dashboard showing the progress of each startup in the current cohort based on the sprints deliverables and attendance)
The sessions are hybrid: we take attendance manually for startups who attend in person. For online we do an automation to
track attendance and we have  a checkbox for each session on zoho that the startup attended the session
Noting that there might be more sessions than the onces mentioned above, we should be able to  add session names and checkboxes anytime
Weekly 1-on-1 meetings with Hani (full attendance required).

PM reviews startups deliverables and attendance and decides if startups qualify to pitch and by changing the status "Eligible to pitch for GTM" the startup then receives an email to pitch, and or "PIC finalist" and the startup gets informed or "Apply to the Support Program"
Startups reaching qualification stage proceed to Pitch Day.
Startup completes an Exit Form by Program Manager, PM to be informed when filled
Hani prepares and submits a final report.
